subcodes.first_line: O Ni'mat! The bounty of God, in the first station and highest rank, hath ever been and shall ever remain His recognition, and likewise His verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نعمت نعمت الهی در مقام اول و رتبه اولی عرفانش بوده و هست و همچنین آیات او
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
